examples: The Swiss wanted to discourage an inflow of foreign money.
Singapore, like other cities in Asia, has seen a big inflow of foreigners, which has mainly pushed up the price of housing and other living costs.
Some argue that people are anxious and feel threatened by an inflow of new workers.
The cost will be lower foreign capital inflow and slower growth, but greater stability should result.
Outflow data has been a response to lower inflow, not redemption of these funds.
